'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 86''' was the eighty-sixth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[August 20]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Versus the [[Witches of Dathomir|Dathomir Witches]]
*[[Horox Ryyder/Legends|Horox Ryyder]]
*[[Shmi Skywalker Lars/Legends|Shmi Skywalker]]
*[[Jorus C'baoth]]
*[[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]]
*Interplanetary Migration
*[[RHTC-560 Hunter Trainer]]
*[[Scout trooper blaster pistol/Legends|Scout Trooper Blaster]]
*[[Scimitar assault bomber|Scimitar Assault Bomber]]
